hq: "The body achieves what the mind believes. Every rep, every set, every drop of sweat is a step closer to the version of you that you've always wanted to be."
extraQuotes: Pain is temporary. Pride is forever.
Don't limit your challenges. Challenge your limits.
Your only competition is who you were yesterday.
fb: At The Key 2 Fitness, women get a dedicated training experience — personalised programmes, expert coaches, and an environment built around your goals. Lose weight, build strength, and feel confident every single day.

training.title: Core Workout Training
training.desc: Build a rock-solid foundation with targeted core exercises. Improve stability, posture and functional strength for every movement you make.

training.title: CrossFit Training
training.desc: High-intensity functional movements that build conditioning, endurance and power. Constantly varied workouts — never boring, always effective.

training.title: Fat Reduction Training
training.desc: Minimum 4 kg weight loss guaranteed per month with our scientifically designed fat-burning programme combined with personalised diet plans.

training.title: Boxing & Combat
training.desc: Release stress, build agility and improve full-body coordination with our boxing and combat training sessions. No experience needed.

training.title: Cardio & Spin Cycling
training.desc: Treadmills, ellipticals and spin bikes. Boost cardiovascular health, burn calories fast and improve stamina with every session.

training.title: Diet Planning
training.desc: Personalised nutrition plans updated every 10 days based on your progress. Real food, real results — no crash diets, no starvation.

ptPackages.title: Personal Training
ptPackages.subtitle: One-on-one coaching · Dedicated trainer
features: Full progress tracking by your trainer

ptPackages.title: Couple Package
ptPackages.subtitle: Train Together · Save Together
features: Both partners get dedicated personal training
Individual diet plans for each person
